query:
ALTER TABLE scenario_templates
  ADD COLUMN org_id VARCHAR(36) DEFAULT NULL AFTER uid,
  ADD COLUMN scenario_uid VARCHAR(36) DEFAULT NULL AFTER org_id,
  ADD COLUMN tags_json JSON DEFAULT NULL AFTER description,
  ADD COLUMN template_json JSON DEFAULT NULL AFTER tags_json,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('PUBLIC','UNLISTED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PUBLIC' AFTER template_json,
  ADD COLUMN status ENUM('PUBLISHED','UNPUBLISHED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PUBLISHED' AFTER visibility,
  ADD COLUMN created_by VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN version INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER created_by;

ALTER TABLE scenario_templates
  ADD INDEX idx_st_status_created (status, created_at DESC),
  ADD INDEX idx_st_org_created (org_id, created_at DESC);
